name: io.github.b1ff/atlassian-dc-mcp-bitbucket
description: MCP server for Atlassian Bitbucket Data Center - interact with repositories and code

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a shared dotenv-style config file. When set, values are read from this file before direct environment variable overrides are applied.
environmentVariables.name: ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Bitbucket host domain (e.g. your-instance.atlassian.net). Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE or BITBUCKET_API_BASE_PATH.
environmentVariables.name: BITBUCKET_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Bitbucket API base path (alternative to BITBUCKET_HOST). Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE or BITBUCKET_HOST.
environmentVariables.name: BITBUCKET_API_BASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Bitbucket Personal Access Token or API token. Required unless provided through ATLASSIAN_DC_MCP_CONFIG_FILE.
environmentVariables.name: BITBUCKET_API_TOKEN
